questions: Is a head marker inert to all ledger consumers?
What orchestration turns the migrator into a safe recovery command?
Does fragment integration actually unify emission?

findings.summary: no version marker exists; a head comment is inert to verify/seal_entry_check/health/badges (verified)
ledger_migrate is never-in-place with --dry-run; missing piece is migrate->verify_post_anchor->atomic swap-on-success orchestration
canonicalize_fragments appends bodies VERBATIM -- writers render hashes; emission unification needs a typed renderer (deferral evidence)
#234/#268/#238 are independent surfaces; none block this slice
